regions.what: Full-bleed golden-hour field photograph (grass field, molehill mounds, warm sky) used as the hero canvas; occluded by nav bar, headline typography, buttons and badge UI that must be repaired out to produce a clean plate.
regions.build_note: Extract full-width photo plate, inpaint the overlaid nav/headline/button pixels; all text and UI rebuilt as live HTML on top with a dark gradient scrim overlay (CSS linear-gradient). FULL-SCENE reconstruction: occluded left side AI-filled with field/sky continuation, edges extended — crop freely with CSS; overlay scrim via CSS gradient.

regions.what: CTA button pair (solid yellow primary + outlined secondary).
regions.build_note: Two <a> buttons: bg-yellow-400 black text uppercase tracking-wide + transparent border-2 border-white variant, rounded-sm, flex gap.

regions.what: Proof caption row at hero bottom-left: small laurel/rank emblem + "RANKED #1 IN UNIVERSITY FIELD STUDIES" uppercase label.
regions.build_note: Inline SVG laurel/rank emblem + small uppercase text, flex items-center gap-2, white/80 over photo scrim. HARD RULE: this is a #1-RANKED badge, NOT a review-star rating — never render review stars or counts.

regions.what: Secondary caption/microcopy text line next to the proof row.
regions.build_note: Plain HTML text, text-sm text-white/70, live copy — never baked into the plate.

regions.build_note: Typography-only lockup: big bold numeral (yellow) over small uppercase gray caption, flex-col items-center.

regions.build_note: Recreate stamp roundel as inline SVG (circle + curved text or icon) with caption below; no raster.

regions.build_note: Inline SVG rosette/ribbon icon + uppercase caption; flat dark bg is section CSS. HARD RULE: rank badge, NOT a review-star rating.
